description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a before_script installing gcc and sudo with `apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq gcc sudo`, installs the Rust toolchain via `curl -sSf https://static.rust-lang.org/rustup.sh | sh`, and prints the versions with `rustc -Vv` and `cargo -Vv`. Define a single job named `build` (using the default stage) that executes `cargo build`. No custom Docker image, services, caches, artifacts, or rules are specified, so the pipeline relies on the runner's default environment.
